title: Craftable Ender Dragon Spawn Egg
description: Craft the ender dragon spawn egg out of a Dragon Egg. Use at your own risk.
body:
# Craftable Ender Dragon Spawn Egg

Craft the Ender Dragon Spawn Egg out of an Dragon Egg!

![Ender Dragon Spawn Egg Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4928d0d35aab7bd0111dae4b9a1f22cb9269b4d4.png)

# Tips
- Spawn the Dragon above ground, else its Ai will be buggy
- Use a Datapack to stop Ender Dragon griefing if you don't want the Ender Dragon to destroy your world
